Description

Type of Change

  • fix: Bug fix
  • feat: New feature
  • refactor: Code refactoring
  • docs: Documentation
  • test: Tests
  • chore: Maintenance/tooling
  • ci: CI/CD changes

Checklist

  • Tests pass locally (node tests/run-all.js)
  • Validation scripts pass
  • Follows conventional commits format
  • Updated relevant documentation
